# Agent App

> v0.3 executable Agent App package standard for host runtimes.

## Core docs

- Specification: docs/en/specification.md
- What is Agent App: docs/en/what-is-agent-app.md
- App vs Skills and Knowledge: docs/en/agent-app-vs-skills-knowledge.md
- Quickstart: docs/en/authoring/quickstart.md
- Runtime package design: docs/en/authoring/runtime-package.md
- Capability SDK: docs/en/client-implementation/capability-sdk.md
- Reference CLI: docs/en/reference/reference-cli.md
- Content Factory example: docs/en/examples/content-factory.md

## Core boundary

Agent App is a complete installable intelligent application package. It can include UI bundles, workers, storage schemas, workflows, agent entries, Skills, Knowledge bindings, tools, artifacts, policies, evals, and overlay templates. It does not replace Agent Skills or Agent Knowledge, and it does not run agents by itself. Hosts install apps, project entries into local catalogs, inject versioned Capability SDK handles, and execute through the host Agent Runtime.

## v0.3 current model

- Current entry kinds: page, panel, expert-chat, command, workflow, artifact, background-task, settings.
- Legacy entry kinds: scene and home are compatibility-only and invalid for manifestVersion 0.3.
- Reference example: APP 内容工厂 / content-factory-app.
